programs.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programs.subtitle: 2001 Final: Bayern Munich v Valencia
programs.description: We revisit the dramatic 2000/01 UEFA Champions League final between Bayern Munich and Valencia at the San Siro in Milan. Bayern were chasing their first title in a quarter-century.

programs.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programs.subtitle: 2002 Final: Real Madrid v Bayer 04 Leverkusen
programs.description: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programs.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programs.subtitle: 2004 Final: AS Monaco v FC Porto
programs.description: A look back at the 2004 final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Porto were led by Jose Mourinho, who would leave the club to take over at Chelsea two days after the final.

programs.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programs.subtitle: 2012 Final: Bayern Munich Chelsea
programs.description: We revisit the 2011/12 UEFA Champions League final between Bayern Munich and Chelsea at the Allianz Arena. This was Chelsea's second final, having lost their last in 2008.

programs.title: LIV Golf League
programs.subtitle: Virginia: Round 4
programs.description: Action from LIV Golf as some of the world's best golfers compete for glory.

programs.title: PREM: The Wrap Up
programs.subtitle: Round 15
programs.description: A look back at all the biggest stories and best action from round 15 of the Gallagher PREM, including Bristol v Saracens, Exeter v Bath, and Leicester v Northampton.

programs.title: The Gruppetto
programs.description: Hosted by Rob Hatch, The Gruppetto brings you everything you need to stay up to speed with the world of cycling, from in-depth race reviews to the latest news from the peloton.

programs.title: Giro d'Italia Cycling
programs.subtitle: Stage 3
programs.description: Highlights from the third and final stage on Bulgarian soil as the peloton takes on a largely flat 175km route from the ancient city of Plovdiv to the capital, Sofia.
